action.reasoning:
Observation: 1-epoch CLIP ViT-B/16 with subset → 17.09% on Quickdraw (already at published baseline). Training was on a subset. Now I should run on full data with more epochs. With 4 GPUs at batch 128 each (total 512), 330k images → ~645 steps/epoch. Subset of ~80k took 53s for 1 epoch, so full data = ~210s/epoch. I have ~9.95h budget. Let me run 5 epochs on full data first to see scaling.

Analysis: The smoke test ran on 80k subset. Full training: ~330k images at batch 512 = 645 steps. With CLIP ViT-B/16 backbone at LR 1e-5 (low) it should improve. Let me also use stronger sketch-bias augmentation since target is Quickdraw - increase SketchifyAug probability. Going to run 5 epochs full data.

Decision: Run 5 epochs full data with current pipeline, then evaluate. Time estimate: ~210s/epoch * 5 = ~18min. Safe.
